skill-python.title: Python: Programming Language
skill-python.subtitle: Used in data science and machine learning
skill-python.description: The language I have the most affinity with for working with data and process automation in general. I use various libraries like numpy, pandas and scikit-learn for statistics and AI models.

skill-cpp.title: C++: Programming Language
skill-cpp.subtitle: Used to work with code abstraction
skill-cpp.description: Essential when performance is a crucial factor in developing libraries or applying algorithms using interoperability. Also relevant in creating artificial intelligence models.

skill-tensorflow.title: Tensorflow: Framework
skill-tensorflow.subtitle: Used in AI modeling with Python
skill-tensorflow.description: Application of deep learning models such as sequential neural networks and generative AI. Useful for forecasting time series and data generation with models like LSTM, GRU and GAN.

skill-html5.title: Html5: Standard Markup Language
skill-html5.subtitle: Used to structure content on the web
skill-html5.description: It's used to create the entire initial structure of a simple page. It consists of a series of elements, represented by tags, which are used to define the structure and content of a web page.

skill-css3.title: Css3: Style Sheet Language
skill-css3.subtitle: Used to stylize web pages
skill-css3.description: After the structure of a page is created with HTML, it's possible to control the presentation and layout of the page with this language.

skill-javascript.title: Javascript: Programming Language
skill-javascript.subtitle: Used for client-side scripting on the web
skill-javascript.description: Allows interactive and responsive web pages, web applications, and mobile applications, like what you're reading right now. In projects more focused on the frontend, it's common to see the combination of HTML, CSS and JavaScript languages to structure, style and add events to web pages.

skill-git.title: Git: Version Control System
skill-git.subtitle: Used to manage project updates
skill-git.description: This is one of the most important Devops tools for project management. All the projects I do are organized with these tools and inserted or updated in Github's repository

skill-docker.title: Docker: Container Application Development
skill-docker.subtitle: Software management in isolated environment
skill-docker.description: It allows you to automate processes so that other users can execute projects without the need for manual management of resources such as dependency installations and configurations. I use docker-compose to manage multiple softwares in the same environment.

skill-mysql.title: MySQL: SQL Database
skill-mysql.subtitle: Used for managing and retrieving data
skill-mysql.description: Commonly used in web applications, as well as in enterprise environments for data storage and management. Very useful for developing schemas to create normalized databases with MySQL Workbench.

skill-postgresql.title: PostgreSQL: SQL Database
skill-postgresql.subtitle: Used to store and scale data workloads
skill-postgresql.description: One of the most advanced databases on the market for working with SQL. This is the bank I'm most familiar with for storing and managing data without the need for a graphical interface

skill-influxdb.title: InfluxDB: Time Series Database
skill-influxdb.subtitle: Used for real-time data handling
skill-influxdb.description: Efficient for storing and querying datasets that have temporal dependency. It's a NoSQL database that uses the Influx language to make queries, in addition to its structure being composed of measurements, series and points.

skill-makefile.title: Makefile: Build automation tool
skill-makefile.subtitle: Used to control the build process of a project
skill-makefile.description: I use this tool to compile and link programs via interoperability, as well as integrate unit tests and automate tasks.

skill-grafana.title: Grafana: Dashboards Web Application
skill-grafana.subtitle: Used for observability and data visualization
skill-grafana.description: This is my main tool for building interactive graphics for statistical or dynamic data analysis. It's generally used to monitor data behavior in real time for decision making. It supports most databases used on the market.
